name: Arena bout reports placement, rivals, and truthful world status

planSteps.description: Enter TestSprite-3113 into the input with data-testid player-name
Click the button with data-testid confirm-player-name
Click the button with data-testid battle-open
The dialog with data-testid battle-modal is visible
Click the button with data-testid deploy-arena
The element with data-testid result-outcome contains text matching ARENA PLACEMENT followed by a numeric rank
The element with data-testid result-rank-cell is visible
The element with data-testid match-ranking-section is visible
The list with data-testid result-ranking contains at least two rows
The element with data-testid leaderboard-section is visible
The element with data-testid leaderboard-status eventually contains WORLD RANKINGS LIVE, NO WORLD ENTRIES, or WORLD LEADERBOARD UNAVAILABLE
Click the button with data-testid back-to-guild
The button with data-testid guild-tab-class is visible
The button with data-testid guild-tab-class has aria-pressed true
The button with data-testid battle-open is visible
